nasb.text: He restored the chief cupbearer to his office, and he put the cup into Pharaoh’s hand;

esv.text: He restored the chief cupbearer to his position, and he placed the cup in Pharaoh’s hand.

cnv.text: 恢復了酒政原來的職位，叫他可以把杯遞在法老的手中；

ccb.text: 恢复了侍酒总管的职位，让他仍旧伺候自己饮酒，

csbs.text: 他使司酒长官复原职，司酒长就仍旧把杯子递在法老的手中；
